---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a new on-device capability or UX improvement
title: "[feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: spatchava
---

## Problem / motivation
What user-facing pain are we solving? Why does it belong in an offline-first app?

## Proposed solution
Sketch the UX, model interaction, and any new tokens/sec or memory budget.

## Alternatives considered

## On-device feasibility
- Memory cost (MB):
- Token budget / latency:
- Affects: chat / voice / translator / keyboard / kid-safe / other

## Additional context
Mock-ups, prior art, references.
